The whole app now speaks your language

Live screenshots (Pixel 9, 2026-06-11). Pick a language in Settings and the ENTIRE chrome follows — every button, label, dialog, the paywall, even the unlock overlay's Continue button. All 7 Indian-language locales shipped (hi, mr, te, ta, kn, bn, gu); Sanskrit users get Hindi chrome while their mantra stays Sanskrit.

You are the first review gate on the wording — please read these three. Flags from the translators worth your eye: Tamil rendered "sadhana" as சாதனை (can read as "achievement" — சாதனா may be better?); Bengali used Bengali numerals (২৬, ৯) in the static paywall lines; Hindi chose निरंतरता for "streak". A native-speaker pass for all 7 stays queued before public launch.

Hindi — हिन्दी

Telugu — తెలుగు

Tamil — தமிழ்
